arts.ttl: Barca dig deep against Leganes with the La Liga crown top of mind
arts.sum: This was an impressive win for Barcelona, after traveling to Leganes on just two days of rest, against a brave team that loves to attack, and who were desperate for points to rescue themselves from the relegation zone. The Dortmund second leg would be a secondary consideration given the four-goal advantage his team was able to build.

arts.ttl: Revealed: What Barca players were told in pre-match huddle
arts.sum: Barcelona enjoyed a motivational pre-match huddle ahead of Saturday’s win over Leganes at Butarque in La Liga . Television cameras picked up the speech, delivered by one of Hansi Flick’s assistant Pepe Conde (the fitness coach), where the players were stressed the importance of the game.

arts.ttl: ‘These are the games where La Liga is won’ - Eric hails ‘fired up’ Barca
arts.sum: Eric Garcia hailed the importance of Barcelona’s win over Leganes after Hansi Flick’s side won 1-0 at Butarque in La Liga on Saturday. The versatile star was back in the starting XI as the Catalans picked up a crucial win that sends Flick’s men seven points clear at the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Leganes vs Barcelona Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Leganes, languishing in the relegation zone, face a daunting task as they host league leaders Barcelona in La Liga. The match kicks off at 20:00 on Saturday, April 12th, at Estadio Municipal de Butarq...

arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona head to Leganes this weekend bidding to extend their lead in the La Liga title race. Hansi Flick’s treble-chasing side face a Leganes team battling to preserve their top-flight status. The Catalans enter the game on the back of a 4-0 thrashing of Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League quarter-finals.
